description: Sequence number within the fiscal year/period (e.g., 1 for Q1)
Numeric value of the operating metric
Number of months or weeks covered by the reporting period, depending on reporting practices
Code for statement context: 1=Profit & Loss, 3=Balance Sheet

Update type provides information on how statements were formulated. Options include: UPD - Update Normal, UCA - Update Calculated, USP - Update Special, RES - Restated Normal, RCA - Restated Calculated, RSP - Restated Special, CLA - Reclassified Normal, CCA - Reclassified Calculated, CSP - Reclassified Special
